primary_blocker: Financial case is marginal: STL Y2 net ~10,066 vs current R2R fixed income 10,800
key_intelligence: EX-STL: property already operating as STL via R2R operator at 900/mo fixed. STL Y2 net only ~839/mo average vs current 900/mo fixed = marginal financial case. Conversion levers are non-financial: control, AirCover protection, listing ownership, personal use flexibility, full visibility. Participants: taoyuanqing@gmail.com + lichunxiaouk@gmail.com (couple/joint owners). Key action: get existing Airbnb listing link for photo/listing assessment. If listing transfer possible (reviews survive), go-live is rapid.
top_objections: Not being kept informed about the property
Will reviews survive the R2R-to-owner transition?
what_resonated: AirCover 2.5M damage cover vs zero under current R2R
